query: If each inspection team can check ten damaged buildings per day, how many team-days are needed to survey all damaged buildings in the post image?

input.text: How many damaged buildings in the post-disaster image?

final_answer:
Total damaged buildings in post image: **38**.
 **4 team-days** are needed to survey all damaged buildings at ten buildings per team per day.

evaluation.question: Is the reported total of damaged buildings within the acceptable range of 34.2 to 41.8 buildings?
is it concluded that 4 team-days are needed to survey all damaged buildings?
